title: ConvSim Scene
description: Validates a scene descriptor file. Scenes supply visual and ambient context for a scenario without affecting game logic.

scene_id.description: Unique identifier for this scene within the pack.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI.

description.description: Prose description of the scene used to set context in the system prompt.

background.description: Relative path to the background image within the pack assets directory.

ambient.description: Ambient audio identifier. Must be a slug defined in the runtime audio registry.
